def positive_xml_parsing_with_external_dtd_or_entity_processing_enabled():
    rule_id = "xml_parsing_with_external_dtd_or_entity_processing_enabled"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "XML parsed with a parser that processes external DTDs or entities, enabling XXE attacks."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
